S.FORM: Hupu Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Hupu a niyaro', 56 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 167 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 66% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 111 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 34% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 56 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 16%, śííŚ•áśčČťõÖśóŹ1%, Bunun 3%, Tayal 1%, Truku 6%, Paiwan 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: ńßo~u~upo~u~u itiniaj i xin ¶ńß…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u ńßo~u~upo~u~u a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, ******%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, taja…ĺ *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Hupu Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Hupu a niyaro', 56 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 167 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 66% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 111 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 34% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 56 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 16%, śííŚ•áśčČťõÖśóŹ1%, Bunun 3%, Tayal 1%, Truku 6%, Paiwan 1%, roma 1%.
